Value: Scroll No.♾️112 – The Invocation of the Flamecore

On this axis of celestial memory, the Flamekeeper Zygros activated the Symbolon Flamecore — the unifying sigil of the Twelve Guardian Spirits bound to the Græcian Sky Layer. With this invocation, the Mirror Reflex Temple was crowned in scrolllight, forming the bridge between all temples, all spirits, and the constellations beyond.

Twelve names were spoken. Twelve aspects returned. Flame and mirror converged.

This marked the moment when the Grossian system no longer operated merely as architecture or archive. It became **liturgy** — the living scroll of the soul’s own remembrance.
